_comment: THE import-conversion decision tree, as data. Source of truth for PIPELINE_MAP.md (the visual) and the completeness gate (tests/conversion/unit/test_pipeline_map.py), which fails the build if any app/Python module or decision registry isn't placed here. Classification is evidence-based (see _evidence) — do NOT guess; trace the PHP processors + imports. Symbols: kind=decision|transform|guard|branch|emit|no_op|dead_end.
meta_insight: Every FRONTEND's job is to produce the BACKEND's input. process_document.py (backend) is HTML-in. So epub/html/docx converge straight to HTML; pdf/md take a MARKDOWN detour (mistral_ocr/-> .md, simple_md_to_html -> .html). The TYPE each frontend detects (pdf footnote-LAYOUT, epub footnote-SCHEME, doc STRATEGY) is the meta-knowledge that drives downstream linking. Corollary for diagnosis: if an artifact is ABSENT from the frontend's intermediate (main-text.md / main-text.html), the bug is UPSTREAM in that frontend; if PRESENT but unlinked, it's in the backend linker.

frontend._role: per-filetype normalizer: produce the backend's input, detecting a TYPE

nodes.goal: an HTML of a footnote SCHEME (the EPUB analogue of PDF's markdown-of-a-layout)

stages.what: structural normalisation (calibre spans, nested divs, dead links) via TRANSFORM_PIPELINE phase 1

nodes.goal: a MARKDOWN of a footnote LAYOUT

stages.no_op: replayed from cache (the test suite + reconvert never re-OCR; fetch_ocr/extract_* are unvalidatable here)

stages.what: RECOVERY layer 2 — a garbled (mojibake) definition page is re-extracted from the PDF bytes via pypdf and spliced back in; emits footnote_warnings (recovered/unrecovered)

RECOVERY layer 1 — resurrect MARKERS OCR rendered as a superscript / LaTeX $^5$ / bare [N] / bare '.46 ' -> [^N], gated by SEQUENTIAL VALIDATION (only if the number fits between surrounding known refs, so years/table-numbers are never mis-converted)

RECOVERY layer 3 — refs with NO definition get their text pulled from the pypdf extraction; the MATCHER (range/dedup/offset/overwrite rules) is pure logic, the extraction needs the PDF; mojibake candidates are rejected (compute_printable_ratio) into footnote_warnings
whose-bug-is-it discriminator: compares OCR-captured refs/defs (page_summary) vs the emitted markdown -> assessment.json record
stages.consumes: footnote_warnings (pypdf recovery outcome from pdf.mojibake + the assemble pypdf-fallback) — markdown is POST-recovery, so fidelity_loss reports the RESIDUAL: unrecovered = pypdf ALSO failed (confirmed upstream) vs recovery not attempted (no PDF in this replay harness = untested)
stages._note: harvest_gap + assembly_collisions are OUR bugs (flagged confidence<0.5 -> vibe loop); fidelity_loss is an UPSTREAM OCR ceiling, but only CONFIRMED once pypdf re-extraction has tried (not flagged either way); not_applicable = non-harvesting layout (none/unknown/bibliography). Real-PDF recovery is exercised by test_pdf_recovery_real.py (opt-in: RUN_PYPDF_RECOVERY=1); the replay harness uses pdf_path=None for determinism.

nodes.goal: HTML for the backend (may emit footnoteSectionStart/DefinitionsStart markers -> sequential strategy)
translate ar5iv/LaTeXML markup (<cite>, ltx_bibitem) to Hyperlit conventions BEFORE sanitisation
nodes.conditional: no-op for non-ar5iv HTML; raw HTML otherwise goes straight to the backend

nodes.goal: strip Word metadata before pandoc (.docx only; optional, failures non-fatal)

backend._role: shared, HTML-in: extract -> link -> audit -> emit nodes/footnotes/references

stages.what: find references section (heading | reverse-scan), key entries, collision-suffix
extract definitions by strategy (+ traditional container)
whole_document: if numbering can't be trusted -> EXTRACT notes but emit NO links (a missing link beats a confident-wrong one)
the verdict: gaps / unmatched refs / unmatched defs

shared._role: cross-cutting libraries used across backend stages

registries._role: every DECISION registry the vibe loop can op:register into (+ the classifier tuples); the completeness gate enforces each is placed

modules._comment: THE COMPLETENESS CONTRACT — every app/Python *.py (top-level + conversion/) is a key here with a band. test_pipeline_map.py fails if any module on disk is missing. bands: frontend|backend|shared|meta|other_subsystem|legacy|dead.

digestion/load/load.py.role: LOAD / input prep — parse HTML · Safari rtl fix · split bib paragraphs

digestion/finalize/finalize.py.role: FINAL stage — coverage flag · span strip · node generation · emit

ingestion/epub/epub_normalizer.py.role: TRANSFORM_PIPELINE registry + EpubNormalizer orchestrator (re-exports the base + phase modules)

ingestion/epub/epub_base.py.role: EpubTransform base ABC (zero-import leaf; broken out so the runpy-as-__main__ backend path can't deadlock)

ingestion/epub/structuralNormalisation.p.role: Phase 1 structural transforms (unwrap calibre/spans/sections, images, dead links)

ingestion/epub/headingMatching.py.role: Phase 1 heading detection (publisher markup -> h1/h2/h3) + HeadingNormalizer

ingestion/epub/footnoteMatching.py.role: Phase 2 run-all footnote detector fan + FootnoteConverter

ingestion/epub/bibliographyDetection.py.role: Phase 3 bibliography SECTION detection (linking/extraction is in digestion)

ingestion/epub/finalNormalisation.py.role: Phase 4 final normalisation: HeadingNormalizer (level gaps) + DeadInternalLinkUnwrapper (runs AFTER footnote conversion)

ingestion/pdf/mistral_ocr.py.role: orchestrator (main + write_classification_assessment) + re-exports; the CLI entry the PHP/vibe backend runs

ingestion/pdf/pdf_shared.py.role: zero-import leaf: PdfClassifier/FootnoteAssembler bases + AssemblyContext + OCR/text-normalisation helpers

ingestion/pdf/ocrFetch.py.role: Mistral OCR fetch + chunking + chunk/segment renumbering

ingestion/pdf/classification.py.role: PDF_CLASSIFIERS cascade + classify_footnotes (decide the footnote layout)

ingestion/pdf/recovery.py.role: pypdf recovery (mojibake, missing defs), mangled URLs, assess_harvest_fidelity

digestion/footnoteLinking/footnote_link_.role: FOOTNOTE_LINK_RULES + MARKER_LINK_RULES (also used by epub frontend)

vibeConverter/runtime.py.subsystem: vibe loop (zero-import leaf: constants + mutable run state)

vibeConverter/routing.py.subsystem: vibe loop (which modules to send + issue narration)

vibeConverter/propose.py.subsystem: vibe loop (LLM call for a candidate patch)

vibeConverter/report.py.subsystem: vibe loop (persist patch + report + GitHub issue)

vibeConverter/cli.py.subsystem: vibe loop (CLI entry; shim delegates here)

epub_processor.py.evidence: EpubProcessor.php invokes epub_normalizer.py (:173), epub_processor only named in a stale comment

process_footnotes.py.evidence: file header 'STANDALONE, ROBUST VERSION'; no PHP invocation

process_references.py.evidence: file header 'DEFINITIVE, JSON OUTPUT VERSION'; no PHP invocation

normalize_headings.py.note: standalone heading util; no live references
